case_title: KASANDRA M SMITH VS. THE MAAS CLINIC et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SMITH, KASANDRA M AS TO DEFENDANT THE MAAS CLINIC DUDAS MD, JASON MAAS MD, COREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

COPYING FEES (32 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, KASANDRA M
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED FEB-04-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUDAS MD, JASON
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE MAAS CLINIC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE MAAS CLINIC WAS REPRESENTED BY PHYSICIAN COREY MAAS MD. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, KASANDRA M IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE MAAS CLINIC DUDAS MD, JASON MAAS MD, COREY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
